name: Scenario H: Assignment conflict → review (two direct-authority, different users)
description: An existing canonical task is assigned to user-jones-001 via direct authority. A new candidate assigns to user-smith-002, also with direct authority. Since both are high-authority and disagree, the conflict routes to review.

existing_canonical_task.canonical_summary: File motion to compel in Johnson matter

candidate_task.canonical_summary: File motion to compel in Johnson matter
